chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 4431 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority Case. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 19628/2024 (Stay/App) 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 01.10.2024. Mr. Muhammad Din Qazi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Asst. Attorney General. ________ Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of concerned Commissioner, which is taken on record. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceeding on the basis of impugned Order-in-Original dated 28.02.2024 initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals-I), Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner to decide the pending Appeal(s) of the Petitioner(s), to which learned counsel for the Respondents concedes. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals-I), Karachi to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application(s). J U D G E J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
